title: Ouligay 300PCS Leaf Beads for Jewelry Making Green Acrylic Green Leaves Pendants Leaf Bead Charms Bulk for DIY Earrings Necklace Bracelet Making
features: Green Leaf Beads: You'll receive 300 green leaf beads. These transparent leaf beads are perfect for spring crafts. The vivid leaf shape offers endless possibilities for your handmade creations
Jewelry Decorations: These vibrant and adorable acrylic leaf beads are perfect for spring-themed jewelry, adding a touch of originality and uniqueness to your jewelry designs
Premium Material: Made from high-quality acrylic, these green leaf beads are lightweight and sturdy, with a smooth surface and no sharp edges. They are an affordable, high-quality jewelry accessory
Wide Applications: These acrylic leaf beads are perfect for DIY jewelry and craft projects, such as personalized earrings, necklaces, bracelets, keychains, chokers, tassel keychains, and chokers

Thoughtful Gift: These transparent leaf charms are perfect for sharing your leaf bead handmade creations with friends, family, loved ones, and classmates on special occasions like christmas, valentine's day, mother's day, and birthdays
description: Clear leaf charms are perfect for a variety of DIY jewelry and crafting projects, including earrings, necklaces, bracelets, keychains, chokers, and home decor. They pair well with pins, jump rings, and hooks, making them a versatile addition to your crafting supplies
